## Summary

Describe the behavior and why it is needed.

## Verification

- [ ] Version consistency check passes.
- [ ] Python compile check passes.
- [ ] Contract tests pass.
- [ ] Tests were added or updated for behavioral changes.
- [ ] No credentials, generated reports, screenshots or proprietary binaries are included.
- [ ] New data sources include license, terms and rate-limit notes.
- [ ] Freshness failures still suppress prohibited action levels.
